\tzpentry{ID4585}{Temp Capacitance Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4585 introduces Temp Capacitance Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{C}_{\text{temp}} = \max \mathcal{I}(X;Y) \text{ s.t. } \Delta t > 0 \land \text{Causality} \end{equation}
